Good Morning, Jeffrey! Back in town after busy week
in Stockholm with all
the BBBs there..but we do have some here too! Female
Economist 2005 Åsa
Carlsson is leaving this Thursday to give a speech
at the school about the
scholarship 2006 and BBB activities. Do we still
have your support?! This is
Sofia, aspiring actress just arrived in NYC who is
the girl I mentioned to
you before I left who I thought you may want to
meet, perhaps we can stop by
before you disappear for the holidays...love Barbro
